docsets.instructions: Maintain user-facing Platform API guides in MDX. Follow docs/CONTENT_AUTHORING.md and the existing directory structure, components, formatting, and tone.
Maintain the Platform API v3 OpenAPI descriptions. Derive every API fact from the upstream source and organize files and references as appropriate for the specification.
Maintain the user-facing iOS SDK guides in MDX. Follow docs/CONTENT_AUTHORING.md and the existing directory structure, components, formatting, and tone.
